name: paralegals in law firms managing 5–15 cases/month tool
description: For paralegals in law firms processing 5–15 cases/month, missed deadlines cause compliance issues. We auto-generate compliance reminder emails instead of manual tracking and reminder systems.

problem_solved: Difficulty in tracking legal case deadlines and ensuring compliance.
